description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was slowing for a right turn from Treat Ave. to Alameda St. in San Francisco, CA with its turn indicator and 
brake lights illuminated, when a following bicyclist struck the rear right corner of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle camera bracket was 
damaged. Police were not called and no injuries were reported.
Print
Clear Form
